description_long: This is a heavy-duty axe featuring a robust, double-bladed head made of dark, textured metal. The blades are wide and flat, with squared-off edges and a slightly angular, geometric design, giving the axe a distinctive, industrial appearance. The head is securely mounted to a cylindrical wooden handle, which is wrapped with a lighter-colored grip material for improved handling. The handle is straight and tapers slightly towards the end, showing signs of wear and use. The metal head has a matte, rough finish with visible hammer marks and some surface irregularities, suggesting it is forged for durability. This tool is well-suited for demanding urban tasks such as demolition, rescue, or heavy chopping.
description: A rugged, double-bladed axe with a dark, textured metal head and a straight wooden handle wrapped for grip. The blades are wide, angular, and designed for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the wide, angular double blades and the cylindrical wooden handle extending backward.
description_view_1: The side view shows the thickness of the metal head, the flatness of the blades, and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: The rear angled view emphasizes the geometric blade design and the secure mounting of the head to the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the symmetry of the blades and the straight, wrapped handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, slightly tapered, wrapped with a light-colored grip, round cross-section, no curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed head with wide, flat, squared-off edges; angular, geometric design; no beard; pronounced poll; rough forged texture.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle through a central eye.
